name: @mieweb/cloud-os
description: os.mieweb.org (self-hosted) adapters implementing the Cloudflare-shaped @mieweb/cloud contracts over durable, networked infrastructure: D1→libSQL/sqld, Vectorize→libSQL native vectors, R2→S3/MinIO, KV+Queues→Valkey/Redis. Durable Objects stay single-node best-effort. Registers via @mieweb/cloud-local's driver registry; reuses the Node host harness.
author: MIEWEB
